currentTask.context: Designing Game 27: River Run - white-water raft, current-reading mechanic, inertia model

gameQueue.title: River Run
gameQueue.concept: Steer a raft through white-water canyon rapids: read swirling current indicators to predict boulder placement, tap left/right to dodge rocks and navigate chutes, brake-tap to manage speed through tight sections. First water-physics navigation in series.
gameQueue.raisesBarOn: First water navigation and current-reading mechanic, first momentum/inertia model, first continuous speed-management alongside obstacle avoidance

gameQueue.title: Brand Iron
gameQueue.concept: Drag a glowing brand iron along a template path burned into the hide - follow the shape precisely while managing iron heat (too cool = faint mark, too hot = burn) across 5 cattle with escalating brand complexity. First path-tracing mechanic in series.
gameQueue.raisesBarOn: First continuous drag/path-tracing input, first dual-axis precision + resource management, most fine-motor challenge in series

gameQueue.title: Jail Break
gameQueue.concept: Turn-based stealth escape from a frontier jail: pick locks, distract guards with thrown objects, slip through shadow zones, and reach the horse waiting outside. Guard patrol AI with vision cones, 5 escalating layouts. First shadow/stealth grid game in series.
gameQueue.raisesBarOn: First stealth grid with vision cones, first object-throw mechanic, most complex guard AI in series

runLog.summary: Built Game 10: Gold Rush - lantern-lit cave mining, BFS pathfinding, triple resource management, 16 tests pass.
Built Game 11: Boot Hill Bluff - turn-based bluffing duel with AI tell system, narrative choices, chip betting. 18 tests pass.
Built Game 12: Stampede - first-person buffalo stampede, 3-lane dodge, signal herd mechanic. 23 tests pass.
Built Game 13: Snake Oil - frontier medicine wagon, match ingredients to ailments, NPC dialogue, 30 tests pass.
Built Game 14: Midnight Rodeo - bareback bull-riding, directional tap-match, crowd energy multiplier, 31 tests pass.
Fixed Midnight Rodeo: taps now register at any time during play, not just the 0.7s telegraph window.
Built Game 15: Prairie Fire - wildfire cellular automaton, 18x26 grid, wind-direction spread, firebreak+water placement, 35 tests pass.
Built Game 16: Moonshine Run - stealth + 3-gauge resource management, revenuer lantern cone detection, 40 tests pass.
Built Game 17: Rope Trick - oscillating aim cursor, parabolic arc, wind drift, 5 rounds, 40 tests pass.
Built Game 18: Dead Man's Hand - Texas Hold'em vs 3 AI outlaws with bluffing tells, full hand evaluator, 44 tests pass.
Built Game 19: Canyon Crossfire - cover-based shooter, 3 outlaws with staggered reload cycles, peek/fire/retreat, 36 tests pass.
Built Game 20: Trail Boss - top-down wagon escort, 3 draining resources, 5 biomes, ambush/supply/river events, 40 tests pass.
Built Game 21: Wanted: Dead or Alive - first-person investigation, 5 locations, confidence meter, accuse mechanic, 47 tests pass.
Built Game 22: Gallows Road - turn-based grid puzzle, 5 levels, guard patrol, crate push mechanic, 37 tests pass.
Built Game 23: Devil's Backbone - hold-to-balance wagon load, spring+damping physics, 5-stage mountain pass, 44 tests pass.
Built Game 24: Dead Reckoning - celestial navigation, star bearing lines, 5-round terrain puzzle, 50 tests pass.
Built Game 25: Fence Line - construction/placement mechanic, wind gusts, cattle gap-seek AI, 5 levels, 42 tests pass.
